title: Imperial Citadel (disambiguation)
content:
'''Imperial Citadel''' could refer to 

==Canon==
*'''[[Imperial citadel]]''', A [[Galactic Empire]] citadel on [[Byss]]

==Legends==
*[[Emperor's Citadel|'''Imperial Citadel''']], a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial Citadel]] on [[Byss/Legends|Byss]]
*[[Imperial Citadel (Eiattu 6)|'''Imperial Citadel''']], a Galactic Empire citadel on [[Eiattu 6]]
*[[Imperial Citadel (Sith Empire)|'''Imperial Citadel''']], a [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]] citadel on [[Dromund Kaas/Legends|Dromund Kaas]]
